name: v0.2.0
body:
## v0.2.0 New Features

### What's New
- Multi-database support (open multiple .db files simultaneously)
- File watching with auto-reload (--watch flag)
- New R logo with tech-style ASCII art
- Shell multi-db switching (.use, .databases commands)
- Centralized version management (Cargo.toml single source)

### Downloads
- [rustminidb.exe](https://github.com/yujian2025/RustMinidb/releases/download/v0.2.0/rustminidb.exe) (Windows)
